glossary.balancing_authority: An entity responsible for balancing electricity supply and demand in real time.
glossary.harvested: Observed BA-visible, utility-scale-visible wind and solar generation at each hour.
glossary.harvestable: Scenario-based modeled estimate of what could have been harvested under the same weather and assumptions.

caveats: Harvested mode uses BA-visible, utility-scale-visible observed values and may not include all behind-the-meter solar.
This dashboard communicates geographic diversity and does not represent a full reliability simulation.
Harvestable mode relies on precomputed scenario assumptions and is not operational dispatch.
